description.en: Convert JSON data to CSV format online for free — and back from CSV to JSON. All conversions run in your browser, nothing is sent to a server.
description.es: Convierte datos JSON a formato CSV en línea gratis — y de vuelta de CSV a JSON. Nada se envía a un servidor.
description.fr: Convertissez des données JSON au format CSV en ligne gratuitement — et inversement. Rien n'est envoyé à un serveur.
description.de: JSON-Daten online kostenlos in CSV konvertieren — und umgekehrt. Alles läuft im Browser, nichts wird an einen Server gesendet.
description.pt: Converta dados JSON para o formato CSV online gratuitamente — e de volta de CSV para JSON. Nada é enviado para um servidor.

intro.en: Switching between JSON and CSV is one of the most common data format conversions. Use our tools to convert JSON arrays to CSV spreadsheets and vice versa — all in your browser.
intro.es: Cambiar entre JSON y CSV es una de las conversiones de formato de datos más comunes. Usa nuestras herramientas para convertir arrays JSON a hojas de cálculo CSV.
intro.fr: La conversion entre JSON et CSV est l'une des conversions de format de données les plus courantes. Utilisez nos outils dans votre navigateur.
intro.de: Der Wechsel zwischen JSON und CSV ist eine der häufigsten Dateiformat-Konvertierungen. Verwenden Sie unsere Tools in Ihrem Browser.
intro.pt: Alternar entre JSON e CSV é uma das conversões de formato de dados mais comuns. Use nossas ferramentas no seu navegador.

question.en: Can JSON to CSV handle nested objects?

answer.en: Our converter handles flat JSON arrays well. For deeply nested JSON objects, the nested fields are flattened using dot notation (e.g., address.city becomes a column). For complex nested structures, you may need to pre-process the JSON first.

question.en: What JSON structure works best for CSV conversion?

answer.en: The best structure is a JSON array of flat objects with consistent keys — for example, [{"name":"Alice","age":30},{"name":"Bob","age":25}]. This converts directly to a CSV with Name and Age columns.

question.en: Can I convert CSV back to JSON?

answer.en: Yes — our CSV to JSON tool converts CSV files or pasted CSV data back into a JSON array of objects. The first row is used as the key names.

title.en: Convert JSON to CSV Online Free — Instant JSON CSV Converter

description.en: Convert JSON to CSV and CSV to JSON online for free. Paste JSON data or upload a file and get an instant CSV download. All in-browser.
